issues.description: Condition checks for Leader on board, but effect requires Leader to have {FILM} type OR <Strike> attribute. Should use LeaderHasAnyType or LeaderHasAttribute condition.

Action is GiveDon (adds DON!! to your pool), but card text says 'set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active'. This should be AttachDon or a similar action that activates existing DON!!, not creates new ones.
Count is 1, but text says 'up to 1', which allows for 0. DSL should support optional actions or clarify max=1.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] If your Leader has the {FILM} type or the <Strike> attribute, set up to 1 of your DON!! cards as active.
